title: Slapdeeg quick cheese scones
excerpt: Ingredients: 500 ml self-raising flour 500 ml grated cheese 500 ml milk 5 ml salt 10 ml red pepper or as much as you can take Method: Mix everything together Spoon into a muffin pan and sprinkle cheese over Bake for 20 min at 180 degrees Quick and delicious.
html:
Ingredients:

  • 500 ml self-raising flour
  • 500 ml grated cheese
  • 500 ml milk
  • 5 ml salt
  • 10 ml red pepper or as much as you can take

Method:

Mix everything together

Spoon into a muffin pan and sprinkle cheese over

Bake for 20 min at 180 degrees

Quick and delicious.
